title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
